//: This lib is the shared, platform-agnostic source consumed by BOTH the Expo app (via the parent mobile/tsconfig.json) and the web app (which aliases @/lib here). It is self-contained on purpose: the web build's tsconfig resolver must NOT walk up to mobile/tsconfig.json, which `extends expo/tsconfig.base` and is unresolvable when only the web deps are installed (CI). Metro/EAS transpile via Babel and ignore this file.
